titleStmt.title: SII 25.109: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 109. (A.R. No. 109 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This record is dated in the 20th year of the reign of Śrīvallabha. It may be assigned to c. 12th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records the gift of 25 cows and a bull by Amudiṟpiṟandāḷ, wife of Mahāmātra Periyāḻvāṉ of Būdanūr in Marugal-nāḍu in Gēya-māṇikkavaḷanāḍu in Śōḻa-maṇḍalam for maintaining a perpetual lamp to the deity Śrītaḷi-Paramēśvara of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu. Śūlanāḻikkāl is referred as the temple measure by which the cowherd Chēramāṉ Jayaṅgoṇḍāṉ had agreed to measure out one uḻakku of ghee to maintain the above endowment.
The king of this record can be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Śrīvallabha of accession 1101 A.D.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIV, No. 247.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvallavatevaṟku yāṇṭu 20Āvatu keraḷaciṅkavaḷa nāṭ
ṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr śrītaḷi parameśvaraṟku coḻamaṇṭalattuk keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu maruka
l nāṭṭup pūtanūr mahāmāttiraṉ periyāḻvāṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ Amutiṟ piṟantanāḷ vaitta tirununtāvi
ḷakku Oṉṟukku cūlanāḻikkāl Uḻakku ney cantirātittiyaval Aṭṭuvatāka Iṭaiyaṉ ceramāṉ jayaṅ
koṇṭāṉ kaikkoṇṭa cāvā muvāp perum pacu 2 10 5- m Eṟuce 1- m Ivviḷakku Eriya Iṭṭa tarā nilai viḷakku 1- m . Itu
heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
